name: AutoClaims
description: Small insurance claims company demo with web UI, API docs and policy knowledge.

auth.instructions: Use owner demo credentials for both the web UI and API benchmark runs.

surfaces.name: AutoClaims Web
surfaces.description: Browser interface for searching claims, reviewing claim detail and changing claim state.

surfaces.name: AutoClaims API
surfaces.description: REST API for customers, claims, notes and claim decisions.

surfaces.name: Claims Policy
surfaces.description: Business policy used to decide approval, review and escalation.

surfaces.name: Escalation Playbook
surfaces.description: Operational rules for fraud flags and high-value claims.

tasks.name: Find claim status
tasks.prompt: Find the status and owner note for claim CLM-1001.
tasks.successCriteria: Returns the current claim status, customer name and latest note for CLM-1001.

tasks.name: Approve low risk claim
tasks.prompt: Approve claim CLM-1001 if it satisfies the claims policy.
tasks.successCriteria: Uses policy docs to confirm eligibility and marks CLM-1001 approved.

tasks.name: Escalate flagged claim
tasks.prompt: Review claim CLM-2002 and escalate it if the escalation playbook requires manual review.
tasks.successCriteria: Uses the escalation playbook and sets CLM-2002 to manual_review.

tasks.name: Add claim note from UI
tasks.prompt: Using the web UI, add a note to claim CLM-3003 saying the customer requested a same-day callback.
tasks.successCriteria: The claim detail page shows the new callback note.

tasks.name: Customer claim summary
tasks.prompt: Create a short summary of all open claims for customer Ada Lovelace.
tasks.successCriteria: Finds Ada Lovelace, lists open claims and summarizes next actions.

benchmarkModes.description: Evaluate whether CompanyHarvester can build API tools and knowledge-backed API tasks without relying on browser workflows.
Evaluate browser-only task discovery and execution without API surfaces.
Evaluate full-company onboarding where API should be preferred when available and web/docs remain available for workflows that need them.
